---
title: "Pol 300: Comparative Politics"
subtitle: "Fall 2026 - Franklin Switzerland"
---

## Welcome

....Under construction....

## Schedule Overview (template)

| Week | Topic | Materials |
|------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | Introduction | [Slides](slides/week01.qmd) |
| 2 | Topic 2 | |
| 3 | Topic 3 | |

## Instructor

**Giacomo Lemoli** — [giacomolemoli.github.io](https://giacomolemoli.github.io)
